title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: A vulnerability was identified in PHPGurukul User Registration & Login and User Management System...
description: A vulnerability was identified in PHPGurukul User Registration & Login and User Management System 3.3. The affected element is an unknown function of the file /admin/yesterday-reg-users.php. The manipulation of the argument ID leads to sql injection. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5543.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in UTT HiPER 1250GW up to 3.2.7-210907-180535. The impacted...
description: A security flaw has been discovered in UTT HiPER 1250GW up to 3.2.7-210907-180535. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /goform/formRemoteControl. The manipulation of the argument Profile results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in UTT HiPER 1250GW allows remote attackers to exploit a stack-based buffer overflow through the manipulation of the 'Profile' argument in the /goform/formRemoteControl endpoint. This could lead to remote code execution, system compromise, or denial of service. The public availability of the exploit significantly increases the likelihood of attacks.
affected_industries: Critical Infrastructure relying on UTT HiPER devices
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of UTT HiPER 1250GW devices to a patched version, if available, or contact the vendor for guidance.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices and restrict access to the /goform/formRemoteControl endpoint.
Monitor network traffic for signs of exploitation, such as unusual activity targeting the affected endpoint, and apply intrusion detection/prevention systems.

title: A vulnerability was determined in code-projects Simple Laundry System 1.0. Impacted is an unknown...
description: A vulnerability was determined in code-projects Simple Laundry System 1.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the file /modstaffinfo.php of the component Parameter Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument userid can lead to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute cross-site scripting (XSS) by exploiting the 'userid' parameter in the Simple Laundry System 1.0. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive user data, session hijacking, or malicious script execution in the context of the affected application.
recommended_actions: Immediately sanitize and validate all user inputs, specifically the 'userid' parameter, to prevent XSS attacks.
Apply a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests targeting the vulnerability.
Monitor for updates or patches from the vendor and apply them as soon as they are available.

recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization for user-supplied data in the 'firstName' parameter to prevent SQL injection.
Update the Simple Laundry System to the latest version or apply patches if available to address the vulnerability.
Monitor logs for unusual database activity and implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests.

title: A vulnerability was detected in QingdaoU OnlineJudge up to 1.6.1. Affected by this issue is the...
description: A vulnerability was detected in QingdaoU OnlineJudge up to 1.6.1. Affected by this issue is the function service_url of the file JudgeServer.service_url of the component judge_server_heartbeat Endpoint. The manipulation results in server-side request forgery. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in QingdaoU OnlineJudge up to version 1.6.1 allows for server-side request forgery (SSRF) attacks via the judge_server_heartbeat endpoint. This could enable attackers to manipulate server requests, potentially leading to unauthorized access to internal systems, data exfiltration, or further exploitation of internal services.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of QingdaoU OnlineJudge if available, or apply temporary mitigations such as disabling the vulnerable endpoint.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization on the judge_server_heartbeat endpoint to prevent malicious requests.
Restrict network access to the affected service, limiting exposure to trusted IPs or internal networks only.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in FedML-AI FedML up to 0.8.9. This impacts an unknown...

The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in FedML-AI FedML up to version 0.8.9 allows for path traversal via the MQTT Message Handler, potentially enabling unauthorized access to sensitive files or system compromise. The exploit is publicly available, increasing the likelihood of attacks.

Implement strict input validation and sanitization for the 'dataSet' argument to mitigate path traversal risks.
Monitor systems for unusual activity, especially related to MQTT communications, and apply intrusion detection systems to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: A weakness has been identified in Tenda 4G03 Pro 1.0/1.0re/01.bin/04.03.01.53. Affected by this...
description:
A weakness has been identified in Tenda 4G03 Pro 1.0/1.0re/01.bin/04.03.01.53. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /etc/www/pem/server.key of the component ECDSA P-256 Private Key Handler. This manipulation causes use of hard-coded cryptographic key
 . It is possible to initiate the attack remotely.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Tenda 4G03 Pro routers allows remote attackers to exploit a hard-coded cryptographic key in the ECDSA P-256 Private Key Handler. This could lead to unauthorized access, interception of sensitive data, or compromise of network communications.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of the Tenda 4G03 Pro router to the latest version if a patch is available.
Restrict remote access to the router by disabling remote management features or limiting access to trusted IP ranges.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and implement intrusion detection systems to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: Wikipedia 12.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers...
description: Wikipedia 12.0 contains a denial of service vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to crash the application by submitting oversized input through the search functionality. title: CVE-2026-5037 - A vulnerability was determined in mxml up to 4.0.4. This issue affects the function index_sort of th
description: A vulnerability was determined in mxml up to 4.0.4. This issue affects the function index_sort of the file mxml-index.c of the component mxmlIndexNew. Executing a manipulation of the argument tempr can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack is restricted to local execution. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. This patch is called 6e27354466092a1ac65601e01ce6708710bb9fa5. A patch should be applied to remediate this issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in mxml up to version 4.0.4 could allow a stack-based buffer overflow via manipulation of the 'tempr' argument in the index_sort function. However, the attack requires local execution, limiting its exploitation scope. If exploited, it could lead to application crashes or potential arbitrary code execution.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the patch 6e27354466092a1ac65601e01ce6708710bb9fa5 provided by the vendor to remediate the issue.
Audit systems to identify any instances of mxml up to version 4.0.4 and prioritize updating or replacing affected versions.
Restrict local access to systems running vulnerable versions of mxml to minimize exploitation risk.

title: CVE-2026-2602 - The Twentig plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'featuredImage
description: The Twentig plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'featuredImageSizeWidth' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.9.7 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

title: CVE-2026-4851 - GRID::Machine versions through 0.127 for Perl allows arbitrary code execution via unsafe deserializa
description:
GRID::Machine versions through 0.127 for Perl allows arbitrary code execution via unsafe deserialization.

GRID::Machine provides Remote Procedure Calls (RPC) over SSH for Perl. The client connects to remote hosts to execute code on them. A compromised or malicious remote host can execute arbitrary code back on the client through unsafe deserialization in the RPC protocol.

read_operation() in lib/GRID/Machine/Message.pm deserialises values from the remote side using eval()

  $arg .= '$VAR1';
  my $val = eval "no strict; $arg"; # line 40-41

$arg is raw bytes from the protocol pipe. A compromised remote host can embed arbitrary perl in the Dumper-formatted response:

  $VAR1 = do { system("..."); };

This executes on the client silently on every RPC call, as the return values remain correct.

This functionality is by design but the trust requirement for the remote host is not documented in the distribution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4851.
